question.text: How frequently must trustees furnish reports on mutual fund activities to SEBI?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Trustees shall furnish to the Board (SEBI) on a half-yearly basis a report on the activities of the mutual fund along with certificates on self-dealing and independent management. **The Trap:** Quarterly is when AMC submits reports to Trustees, not when Trustees report to SEBI. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The half-yearly trustee report is a critical regulatory compliance document.
